fragility_points: A fast macro or crypto risk-off move before noon ET.
Binance-specific market-data or operational anomaly near settlement.
Price compressing toward 70000 overnight or in the morning session.
key_assumptions: No major negative catalyst forces BTC down roughly 3%+ before noon ET on April 14.
Binance remains a usable and reliable reference venue into the settlement minute.
Current above-threshold trading is informative for near-term settlement odds.
main_logical_chain: Polymarket rules define settlement as the Binance BTC/USDT 12:00 ET one-minute candle close on April 14.
Current Binance BTC/USDT is roughly 3%+ above 70000.
With less than 24 hours left, absent a negative catalyst the threshold is more likely than not to hold at the settlement minute.
Single-minute and single-venue path risk keeps confidence below the mid-90s.
main_thesis: Binance BTC/USDT is already materially above 70000 with less than 24 hours left, so Yes is likely unless a sharp negative repricing or venue-specific anomaly hits the exact settlement minute.
quote_anchors: This market will resolve to 'Yes' if the Binance 1 minute candle for BTC/USDT 12:00 in the ET timezone (noon) ... has a final 'Close' price higher than the price specified in the title.
assigned current price is 0.845, implying an 84.5% market probability for Yes
source_quality_view: Primary evidence quality is high because Binance is the named resolution source and direct Binance data was checked; contextual independence is only medium because the core evidence is venue-bound, though CoinGecko provided a sanity cross-check.
strongest_disconfirmers: The contract depends on a single Binance one-minute close at 12:00 ET, so a brief sharp selloff or localized print anomaly could still resolve No.
strongest_supports: Direct Binance checks showed BTC/USDT around 72200-72380 during the run.
Recent Binance 1-minute klines were all above 70000 in the sampled interval.
Less than one day remains until settlement.
timing_relevance: The market is mostly about surviving the next ~23 hours above the threshold; the key catalyst is the absence or presence of a sharp bearish repricing trigger before the exact noon ET settlement minute.
unresolved_ambiguities: How Binance UI labeling and final candle-close convention are operationalized for settlement if any display/API discrepancy appears.
Whether any unscheduled news catalyst emerges before noon ET.
what_would_change_view: I would lower the estimate materially if Binance BTC/USDT falls toward 70500-71000 before settlement, if a major bearish macro/crypto headline hits, or if Binance-specific data/reliability issues emerge near noon ET.
